_comment: Postair feature flag registry. All trunk-based deployments gate unreleased work here.
_docs: To enable a flag locally, set the corresponding key to true. Never ship with VERTICAL_SWIPE or RAG_SEARCH enabled in production until integration tests pass.

FOCUS_MODE.description: Post detail focused reading mode — blurred background overlay

VERTICAL_SWIPE.description: Quick post overview via vertical swipe gesture on feed

RAG_SEARCH.description: AI-augmented hybrid search — BM25 + Qdrant vector retrieval + LLM query expansion + web search enrichment

REDIS_POST_CACHE.description: Redis-backed post detail caching via Upstash for reduced latency on focused reading mode

SWIPE_TO_RELATED.description: Performance-optimized swipe transition between related posts on post detail view
